reference_policy.confirmed_official: Directly supported by published primary material or an official licensed source.
reference_policy.reasonable_interpretation: A conservative spatial connection inferred from multiple supported facts.
reference_policy.original_reconstruction: A project-authored choice required to make a coherent playable map; not official canon.
reference_policy.warning: Coordinates and region borders are development reconstruction unless explicitly marked otherwise.

coordinate_system.origin_rule: Floor centre at terrain reference elevation.
coordinate_system.floating_point_strategy: Keep each floor near its own origin and never place all 100 floors far apart in one coordinate space.

streaming.far_landmarks: region-level low-detail proxies remain loaded independently of gameplay chunks
streaming.region_chunk_relationship: A chunk has one primary region ID and may list overlap region IDs near authored borders.
streaming.multiplayer_interest_rule: Server authority owns actors; clients subscribe to their active chunk plus configured neighbour rings.
notes: Streaming is not implemented in Milestone 12.
Navigation seams require border overlap or links between neighbouring chunk maps.
Spawn definitions remain data; runtime entities should not be saved as Node references.
